summary: The diff implements both required features: REQ-1 modifies WebsiteLayoutPanel to display local time with inline UTC offset format, and REQ-2 adds a local time display above the UTC Offset Selection button in LocationMapExplorer. Both implementations include real-time updates and match the specified format.

hallucinated_features.description: Geocoding of default search place to get coordinates for timezone calculation
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not specify implementing geocoding or using OpenStreetMap API to resolve the default search location to coordinates. REQ-1 only requests modifying the display format, not the underlying timezone calculation mechanism.

hallucinated_features.description: Loading timezone data using loadTimeZoneData utility function
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention implementing or using timezone data loading utilities. The requirement focuses on display format changes, not timezone infrastructure.

hallucinated_features.description: Using findTimeZone utility for timezone lookup by coordinates
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not specify implementing coordinate-based timezone lookups. The focus is on formatting the existing UTC offset display.
